# Quarto Revealjs Notes

Source URLs:
- https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/
- https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/themes.html

## Useful reminders

- Slides are created from markdown headings.
- Use `code-line-numbers` for progressive explanation of code.
- Use `.columns` and `.column` divs for side-by-side layouts.
- Use speaker notes with `::: {.notes}`.
- Theme customization can be shared with the website through Sass variables and CSS rules.
- Scrollable and smaller slides help when code-heavy content would otherwise overflow.
